reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for ambitious students.

review_content.Placements: Salary packages offered are very good and satisfy students, but students have to work hard. Students who have a CGPA of 8 out of 10 definitely get good internships at reputed companies.

Attendance of 75% is compulsory in this college, otherwise, students will not be eligible for exams. The pass percentage is 50%. The difficulty level of semester exams is average if students have studied properly.

review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really good, all amenities, labs library, submission then, gathering spaces landscape, parking, everything is properly maintained. Proper sanitation facilities, drinking water, and canteen with hygienic food, and there are Wi-Fi on the campus.

Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 30,000 - 2,07,000. Aspirants have to payINR 69,000 - 1,38,000for PG courses.

courses_data.name: J.R. Media Institute UG Diploma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: J.R. Media Instituteoffers UG Diploma for 6 months - 1 year at the UG level. This course is offered in full time mode. Candidates are offered admission in UG Diploma based on their qualifying exam scores. The university offers UG Diploma in specialisations such as Multimedia & Digital Media and Anchoring & Reporting, etc. Selected candidates have to pay a total tuition fees ofINR 30,000 - 55,000. Check below the J.R. Media Institute eligibility criteria for UG Diploma:

courses_data.name: J.R. Media Institute Certificate Admission 2025
courses_data.description: At the Certificate level,J.R. Media Instituteoffers Certificate in full time mode. The programme is offered for a duration of 6 months - 8 months. J.R. Media Institute Certificate admissions are merit-based and students are required to complete graduation. The programme is offered in specialisations such as Digital Marketing, Graphic Design and Video Editing (Post Production). Some other key highlights for J.R. Media Institute Certificate admissions are given below: J.R. Media Institute Certificate fees isINR 20,000 - 35,000and includes caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Some of these are charged only once during admissions. reviews.review_heading: Good experience studying in this college. This college focuses on practical more than theory.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are airy and they all are air-conditioned. Chairs are very comfortable. There are 2 studios for practice of anchoring, and one lab full of computers and all the computers work. Staff is very well behaved. Sorry, there is not hostel facility.
